subtitle: Conversations on faith, fire, and the Kingdom. New episodes weekly.

episodes.title: Why FIRE CAMP Exists.
episodes.description: The origin story. Why we started. What we believe God is doing. And why we refuse to make it smaller than it is.

episodes.title: Anointing and Excellence Are Not Opposites.
episodes.description: What it means to honour God with craft. Why the best church media is the best witness.
